build.detail: webpack compiled with 3 warnings (asset size limits only, no errors). No TypeScript compilation errors.

lint.detail: 66 errors (all prettier formatting), 24 warnings (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps). All auto-fixable with bun run lint:fix.

issues.message: useEffect has missing dependencies: attributes.tabsDescription, attributes.tabsHeading, innerBlocksLength, setAttributes
issues.note: Common pattern in WP block development where adding all deps would cause infinite loops. Acceptable.

registration.detail: Both block.json files are valid. Parent takt/tabs has apiVersion 3, correct category, anchor support, all attributes. Child takt/tabs-item has parent constraint [takt/tabs], correct attributes (tabTitle, tabDescription, anchor).

attributes.detail: All attributes match spec. Parent: anchor(string), eyebrow(string), heading(string), description(string), buttons(array), tabsHeading(array, default []), tabsDescription(array, default []). Child: anchor(string), tabTitle(string), tabDescription(string).

edgeCases.detail: Test page includes 6 variations covering: full content with buttons (4 tabs), blue accent without buttons (3 tabs), minimal content (2 tabs, heading only), many tabs edge case (8 tabs), long content in tab (multiple headings and paragraphs), green accent with descriptions. All render correctly.

accessibility.detail: Desktop: tablist with role=tablist, aria-orientation=vertical on .tabs-tablist. Tab buttons have role=tab, aria-selected, tabindex, id. JS setupAria() adds aria-controls and sets tabpanel role on .tabs-item-content. Keyboard nav: ArrowUp/Down, Home/End, Enter/Space. Mobile: native <details>/<summary> semantics, JS removes tabpanel roles on mobile mode. group-open: variant used for plus/minus icon rotation on <details> open state.
accessibility.responsiveModeSwitch: JS switches ARIA between desktop (tabpanel roles) and mobile (native details/summary). On mobile-to-desktop transition with all closed, first tab auto-selected.

markupDuplication.detail: NO content duplication. Each TabsItem content lives once inside a <details> element. Desktop: tablist buttons control which <details> is open, <summary> hidden via md:!hidden. Mobile: native <details>/<summary> accordion. Content is never duplicated between desktop and mobile views - the same <details> elements serve both modes.

tsxPhpSync.detail: Parent (Tabs): Both use <section> wrapper with 'tabs py-10 sm:py-16'. Both have container with 'grid grid-cols-1 gap-y-10 sm:gap-y-16'. Both use ThemeHeading with columns=2, headingSize=3. Both have tabs-layout div with 'flex flex-col md:flex-row items-stretch'. Both have tabs-tablist with 'hidden md:flex flex-col gap-4 py-16 flex-1'. Both have tabs-panels with 'flex-1 flex flex-col md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl md:p-6 gap-4 md:gap-0'. Child (TabsItem): Both use <details> as root element with matching class structure ('tabs-item group transition-all', 'border border-charcoal rounded-3xl md:border-0 md:rounded-none', 'open:bg-accent open:border-accent md:open:bg-transparent'). Both have <summary> with 'tabs-item-summary md:!hidden py-4 px-6...'. Both have .tabs-item-content with 'px-6 pb-6 pt-2 md:p-0'. Inner blocks wrapped in .discourse div.

innerBlocks.detail: Parent allows only takt/tabs-item. Template includes one takt/tabs-item by default. Custom Appender used. Child allows any blocks. Tab items correctly nested with InnerBlocks content.

specCompliance.detail: Test page contains 6 tab block instances matching all 6 spec variations. Variation 1 (yellow, 4 tabs with buttons), Variation 2 (blue, 3 tabs no buttons), Variation 3 (minimal, 2 tabs heading only), Variation 4 (orange, 8 tabs edge case), Variation 5 (purple, long content), Variation 6 (green, 2 tabs with descriptions). All accent color wrapper groups present.

issues.description: Prettier formatting errors in Tabs.tsx (30 issues) and TabsItem.tsx (1 issue). All auto-fixable.

useEffect in Tabs.tsx (line 80) has missing dependencies (attributes.tabsDescription, attributes.tabsHeading, innerBlocksLength, setAttributes). This is a common pattern in WP block development where including all deps would cause infinite re-render loops.

fix.suggested: Add // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps above the dependency array if desired, or leave as-is since this is an intentional pattern.

issues.description: In Tabs.php, $panelId variable is defined on line 34 but never used in the HTML output. The aria-controls attribute is managed entirely by JS. This is dead PHP code.

PHP generates initial tab button IDs in format 'tab-{baseId}-{index}' while JS overwrites them with '{baseId}-tab-{index}'. The JS setupAria() runs on DOMContentLoaded and re-sets all IDs. This works correctly but there is a brief moment where PHP-set IDs exist before JS replaces them. Not a functional issue since aria-controls (only set by JS) always matches the JS-generated ID format.

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors (webpack warnings only - asset size limits)
Block registers correctly - both parent (takt/tabs) and child (takt/tabs-item) have valid block.json with apiVersion 3
All 11 required files exist: block.json, index.tsx, Tabs.tsx, Tabs.php, Tabs.js, Tabs.svg (parent) + block.json, index.tsx, TabsItem.tsx, TabsItem.php, TabsItem.svg (child)
All attributes defined with correct types and defaults matching spec
NO content duplication - each tab content lives once in a <details> element serving both desktop and mobile
TSX and PHP structures match: <details> root, <summary> with md:!hidden, .tabs-item-content, .discourse inner wrapper
ARIA attributes correct: tablist/tab roles on desktop, native details/summary on mobile, keyboard nav (ArrowUp/Down/Home/End/Enter/Space)
Frontend renders all 6 test variations correctly: 6 sections with correct child counts (4, 3, 2, 8, 2, 2 = 21 total tabs)
Details+summary HTML structure valid: every section has matching details, summary, and content elements
Inner blocks configuration correct: parent allows only takt/tabs-item, child allows any blocks
Test page has real block instances (6 takt/tabs blocks verified via raw content)
JS breakpoint (min-width: 60rem) correctly matches theme md breakpoint (--breakpoint-md: 60rem)
group-open: CSS variant correctly rotates plus/minus icon on native <details> open attribute
Responsive mode switching: JS transitions between desktop tablist mode and mobile accordion mode

architectureNotes.detailsElementPattern: Each TabsItem uses a <details> element as its root. Content lives once - no duplication. Desktop: tablist buttons control which <details> is open via JS. <summary> is hidden via md:!hidden. Mobile: native <details>/<summary> accordion. JS prevents summary clicks on desktop.
architectureNotes.contentFlow: Desktop: .tabs-tablist buttons -> selectTab() -> open/close <details> elements. Mobile: native <details>/<summary> toggle. Content in .tabs-item-content div (child of <details>).
architectureNotes.ariaStrategy: JS-managed: setupAria() sets IDs, roles, aria-controls on init. setDesktopMode() adds tabpanel roles. setMobileMode() removes tabpanel roles for native details/summary semantics.
architectureNotes.breakpointAlignment: JS uses (min-width: 60rem) matching theme --breakpoint-md: 60rem (960px). CSS md: prefix maps to same value.
